Namâdi has asked you to use her Mûmak Trainers' Horn to train a young mûmak and bring it back to her at Khanâg Gur. You should go to the Spent-lodes i…
You're pretty sure it is impossible to befriend a young mûmak by just using the Mûmak Trainers' Horn.
